sprints.title: AgentForge v4.9 — v5 Architecture Planning & Technical Foundation

items.title: v5 Architecture RFC
items.description: Full RFC for v5 platform: monorepo, multi-workspace, plugin system, agent protocol v2, deployment models, migration path.

items.title: UI Framework Evaluation
items.description: Evaluated React 19, Svelte 5, SolidJS across 7 dimensions. Recommended SvelteKit. Weighted score: Svelte 8.40, React 7.25, Solid 6.80.

items.title: Enterprise Design System Spec
items.description: Complete design system: tokens (color, type, spacing, motion), 20 component specs, WCAG 2.1 AA, dark/light mode, responsive breakpoints.

items.title: Multi-Tenant Data Architecture
items.description: Database-per-workspace isolation. Full schema for master DB and workspace DB. v4 migration strategy. PostgreSQL compatibility layer.

items.title: Plugin Architecture Prototype
items.description: Plugin manifest schema, sandboxed child process execution, IPC protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0), SDK API, dashboard section loading, security model.

items.title: Autonomous Agent Protocol v2
items.description: Typed message bus with 25+ message types. Agent lifecycle state machine. Self-proposal system. Escalation protocol. Confidence-based routing.

items.title: Embedding Search MVP Spec
items.description: Local embedding search with @xenova/transformers. all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dim). SQLite storage. <100ms search over 10K docs. REST + CLI API.

items.title: v5 Sprint Seed
items.description: v4.9 sprint JSON with all items completed. v5.0 sprint items defined: 8 P0, 7 P1, 7 P2.

sprints.title: AgentForge v5.0 — Platform Foundation

items.title: Monorepo Scaffold
items.description: Initialize pnpm workspace with Turborepo. Create packages: core, server, dashboard, cli, db, plugins-sdk, embeddings, shared. Configure TypeScript project references. CI pipeline with Turbo caching.

items.title: Database Adapter Layer
items.description: Implement DatabaseAdapter interface with SqliteAdapter and PostgresAdapter. Workspace DB schema from v49-4. Migration runner. Connection pool management.

items.title: Multi-Workspace Runtime
items.description: Master DB with workspace registry. WorkspaceDb class. Workspace CRUD operations. Workspace switching in CLI and API. Per-workspace agent loading.

items.title: REST API v5
items.description: Express/Fastify server with /api/v5/ namespace. All CRUD endpoints for agents, sessions, delegations, sprints, feedback, memory. Standard envelope. OpenAPI spec generation.

items.title: WebSocket Server
items.description: Replace SSE with WebSocket. Multiplexed channels: workspace events, session messages, agent status. Connection management. Auth via token on connect. Heartbeat/reconnect.

items.title: SvelteKit Dashboard Scaffold
items.description: Initialize SvelteKit app in packages/dashboard. File-based routing for all pages. App shell with sidebar and topbar. API client with TypeScript types auto-generated from OpenAPI. Design system foundation (tokens, base styles).

items.title: Plugin Runtime
items.description: Plugin loader, child process forking, IPC channel (JSON-RPC 2.0), permission enforcement, crash recovery with circuit breaker, plugin install/enable/disable CLI commands.

items.title: Agent Protocol v2 Message Bus
items.description: LocalMessageBus implementation. All 25+ message types. Agent lifecycle state machine. Message persistence to events table. Bus subscriber registration.

items.title: Embedding Search Engine
items.description: @xenova/transformers integration. Embedding generation, storage, cosine similarity search. Incremental indexing on session/feedback creation. REST search endpoint. CLI search command.

items.title: Agent Self-Proposal System
items.description: Implement trigger conditions (idle timeout, event trigger, scheduled review). Proposal evaluation rules. Auto-approval thresholds. Supervisor queue for manual review.

items.title: Confidence-Based Routing
items.description: Per-domain confidence scores per agent. Score update algorithm. Routing decisions based on confidence + availability. Confidence dashboard section.

items.title: Escalation Protocol
items.description: Escalation chain (agent → lead → VP → CTO → CEO → human). Response timeouts. Automatic escalation on timeout. Escalation metrics tracking. Resolution feedback loop.

items.title: Design System Components (Batch 1)
items.description: Implement first 10 components from v49-3 spec: Button, Input, Select, Table, Card, Modal, Badge, Chip, Tabs, Toast. Full Storybook with all variants.

items.title: Dashboard Pages (Batch 1)
items.description: Port v4 dashboard sections to SvelteKit: Agent Cards, Session Timeline, Cost Analytics, Sprint Tracker, Org Graph. All data-driven via REST + WebSocket.

items.title: Adaptive Model Routing v2
items.description: Cost-aware routing that considers agent confidence, task complexity, and budget remaining. Route simple tasks to Haiku, complex to Opus. Routing decision logged and auditable.

items.title: RBAC Implementation
items.description: Role-based access control: owner, admin, member, viewer roles. Permission checks on all API endpoints. Role assignment UI in dashboard. Audit log for permission changes.

items.title: Audit Trail
items.description: Comprehensive audit_log table. All state-changing operations logged with user, action, resource, details, IP. Audit log viewer in dashboard with filtering. Export to CSV.

items.title: Deployment Packaging
items.description: Docker image with multi-stage build. Docker Compose template (server + optional PostgreSQL + Redis). Binary packaging via pkg for self-hosted. Helm chart scaffold for Kubernetes.

items.title: Design System Components (Batch 2)
items.description: Implement remaining 10 components: Spinner, EmptyState, ErrorBoundary, CodeBlock, Chart, Tree, Timeline, Sidebar, Topbar, Tooltip. Storybook integration.

items.title: v4 Migration Script
items.description: Automated npx agentforge migrate command. Detect v4 installation, create master DB, transform schema, import agents/sprints/feedback, validate integrity, generate report. Dry-run mode. Backup before migration.

items.title: Plugin SDK Documentation
items.description: Developer guide for building plugins. Manifest schema reference. SDK API reference. Example plugin walkthrough. Testing plugins guide. Publishing to npm guide.

items.title: v5.0 Test Suite
items.description: Target: 3000+ tests. Unit tests for all packages. Integration tests for API + WebSocket. E2E tests for dashboard. Plugin sandbox tests. Migration tests. Embedding search benchmarks.

successCriteria: Monorepo builds in <60 seconds with Turbo cache
Multi-workspace: create, switch, delete workspaces via CLI and API
All v4 API endpoints available under /api/v5/ with same data
WebSocket replaces SSE for all real-time features
SvelteKit dashboard renders all v4 sections with design system components
Plugin system: install, enable, disable, uninstall plugins via CLI
Agent Protocol v2: typed messages on bus, persisted to events table
Embedding search: <100ms over 10K documents, REST + CLI interface
RBAC: 4 roles enforced on all API endpoints
v4 → v5 migration: automated, lossless, with dry-run mode
Docker image builds and runs successfully

items.title: Agent Execution Runtime
items.description: Implement AgentRuntime in packages/core — actual Claude API invocation, token tracking, session persistence via WorkspaceAdapter

items.title: v5 Server Bootstrap
items.description: Wire WorkspaceManager + MessageBusV2 + AuditTrail + createServerV5 into bootable entry point at packages/server/src/main.ts

items.title: Monorepo Build System
items.description: Fix tsconfig project references across all 8 packages so turbo build runs clean

items.title: SvelteKit Dashboard Live Data
items.description: Wire all 9 SvelteKit pages to real v5 API endpoints, WebSocket live updates

items.title: Plugin Hot-Reload
items.description: Load plugins from .agentforge/plugins/ at server start, watch for changes

items.title: Cross-Workspace Learning
items.description: EmbeddingStore auto-indexes session outcomes; AdaptiveRouter learns across workspaces via master registry

items.title: Session Cost Telemetry
items.description: AgentRuntime records input/output tokens and cost per session in WorkspaceAdapter

items.title: Dev Experience
items.description: npm run v5:dev starts server (4750) + dashboard (4751) concurrently via concurrently package

items.title: Agent Self-Improvement Loop
items.description: SelfProposalEngine reads session outcomes and auto-proposes sprint items

items.title: v5 Org Graph
items.description: Live org graph from delegation.yaml in SvelteKit with real agent data

items.title: Integration Test Suite
items.description: Full server integration tests: boot v5 server, hit all /api/v5/* endpoints, verify responses

items.title: v5.1 Release
items.description: Bump to v5.1.0, update sprints, write retro
